title: Params Schema for mmeka2025 mechanism model v1
description: Parameter specification schema for the mmeka2025 degradation mechanism model (Mmeka, Dubarry & Bessler 2025). All physical parameters are phenomenological.

value.description: The parameter value. null means pending_fit (not yet determined).

status.description: Provenance status of this parameter value.

fit_step.description: Which FIT step produced this value (e.g. 'FIT-4a'). null if not fitted.

fit_source.description: Source script or notebook that produced the fit. null if not fitted.

fit_script_version.description: Git commit or version tag of the fit script. null if not fitted.

fit_r_squared.description: R-squared goodness-of-fit metric. null if not fitted.

uncertainty.description: Uncertainty estimate for the value. null if unknown.

model_version.description: Mechanism model version this parameter spec targets.

material_spec_ref.description: Relative path (from project root) to the material spec file this parameter spec is paired with.

fitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when fitting was completed. null if fitting is not yet done.

C0_PE_correction_factor.description: FIT-0 correction factor for initial PE capacity C0_PE. Phenomenological parameter from C/40 discharge curve fitting.

C1.description: NE-side RC circuit capacitance [F]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-2/3 EIS fitting.

C2.description: PE-side RC circuit capacitance [F]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-2/3 EIS fitting.

C3.description: Additional RC circuit capacitance [F] (unused in current model). Phenomenological parameter.

fractionR1toRs.description: Fraction of R1 (NE resistance) allocated to series resistance Rs. Phenomenological parameter.

fractionR2toRs.description: Fraction of R2 (PE resistance) allocated to series resistance Rs. Phenomenological parameter.

k_SEI_cal.description: Calendar SEI growth rate constant [A^2*s]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4a.

k_SEI_cyc.description: Cyclic SEI growth rate constant [F = A*s/V]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4b.

E_a_SEI.description: SEI Arrhenius activation energy [J/mol]. Phenomenological parameter.

alpha_f_SEI.description: SEI symmetry factor alpha_f [-]. Convention value 0.5.

k_LP.description: Lithium plating exchange current density constant [A]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4b.

alpha_LP.description: Lithium plating symmetry factor [-]. Convention value 0.5.

V_LP_eq.description: Lithium plating equilibrium potential vs Li/Li+ [V]. Convention value 0.0 (static assumption, see S2 errata).

k_LAM_PE_cal.description: Calendar LAM rate constant for positive electrode [A]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4a.

k_LAM_PE_cyc.description: Cyclic LAM rate constant for positive electrode [-]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4b.

gamma_PE.description: Voltage-dependent exponent for PE calendar LAM [-]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4a.

k_LAM_NE_cal.description: Calendar LAM rate constant for negative electrode [A]. Convention value 0.0 (NE calendar LAM assumed negligible).

k_LAM_NE_cyc.description: Cyclic LAM rate constant for negative electrode [-]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4b.

gamma_NE.description: Voltage-dependent exponent for NE calendar LAM [-]. Convention value 0.0 (unused since k_LAM_NE_cal=0).

R_SEI.description: SEI intrinsic specific resistance [Ohm, normalized]. Phenomenological parameter from FIT-4a.

R_NE_0.description: Initial NE total resistance anchor [Ohm], derived from R_NE LUT at 50% SOC, C/3. Phenomenological parameter.

resistance_mat.description: Relative path (from project root) to the resistance lookup table .mat file.

resistance_mode.description: Resistance closure construction mode. Determines how Rs, R1, R2 functions are built from the LUT.

Q0_LLI_PE.description: Initial LLI on positive electrode [A*s]. Convention value 0.0.

Q0_LAM_PE.description: Initial LAM on positive electrode [A*s]. Convention value 0.0.

Q0_LAM_NE.description: Initial LAM on negative electrode [A*s]. Convention value 0.0.

Q0_PLA_NE.description: Initial plating on negative electrode [A*s]. Convention value 0.0.

X_LAM_PE.description: Li stoichiometry in lost PE active material [-]. Convention value 0.0.

X_LAM_NE.description: Li stoichiometry in lost NE active material [-]. Convention value 0.0.
